notes: Public governance positions disclosed by AFCC on its own website. These individuals serve in officer or director roles and are therefore publicly identified AFCC members. Non-officer rank-and-file members are documented in IRS Form 990 filings (https://projects.propublica.org/nonprofits/organizations/391647468) but are not reproduced here.

externalSources.label: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer — AFCC Form 990 filings
externalSources.note: Lists board members, officers, and key employees for each filing year. Public membership rosters are NOT on the 990.

externalSources.label: AFCC member search (requires login / membership)
externalSources.note: AFCC's internal directory is member-only; membership status of specific judges/attorneys/evaluators must be confirmed through a combination of conference attendance lists, committee rosters, published articles in AFCC journals (FCR), and state-chapter leadership pages.
